title: Croparium: Create
description: Adapting 5 ore resources from Create into farming mechanics.
body:
![Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed1cc3ea33df692be3776799c68aed31fe366f5.png)

Adapting 5 ore resources from Create (Andesite Alloy, Zinc Ingot, Brass Ingot, Rose Quartz, and Chromatic Compound) into farming mechanics. 

These resources can be cultivated and harvested just like ordinary crops.

The cultivation relies on special farmland, which must be reclaimed from common stones found in the Overworld.
![Ore Crops Must Be Planted On Special Farmlands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a26de96d331dd426368471ab781f31ecbb73b588_0.webp)

[**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) and [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod is required.

For mods compatible with Forge 1.20.1, Forge version 47.4.0 or higher is required.

For details, refer to [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) mod. It includes more comprehensive cultivation instructions to help you get started with farming smoothly.

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dfc7eb36719721c09de83da0e9126580fcbeb42.png)
